subject: Research coding-agent-first framework design
description: Research what "coding agent first" means for a framework. How do AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Aider, Devin) interact with codebases? What makes a framework easy for agents to generate, debug, and modify? Research: convention over configuration, predictable file structures, type-safe APIs, clear error messages, CLI tooling for agents, code generation patterns, MCP/Tool calling integration, structured logging, agent-friendly debugging.
